_comment: Species: Spirit Tortoise (灵龟) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Spirit Tortoise

canonical.appearance: Ancient tortoise 1 m shell, shell spirit-jade, age measured in millennia
canonical.size: 1 m shell adult, 200 jin; ancient 5 m, 5000 jin
canonical.behavior: Patient cultivator; cultivates by absorbing earth-essence; sleeps for centuries
canonical.habitat: Earth-aspected springs, ancient caves, spirit veins
canonical.bloodline: Spirit-Tortoise lineage; earth-attribute bloodline (dilute Black Tortoise)
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: spirit_tortoise — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
